title: anisomeles ovata
intro: Anisomeles ovata, also known as the Dwarf Jasmine or Parijat, is a flowering plant native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The leaves of the Anisomeles ovata plant are believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as a natural antiseptic. Anisomeles ovata is often prepared as a decoction, powder, or oil, and is used in various herbal preparations to promote overall well-being and treat various health conditions.
